candidate_scan.recommendation: Need 8 new recordings outside the current development pool before creating data/selector_true_heldout_split.csv.

success_gates.requirement: Provide a sealed split CSV before running any metric claim.
No true-heldout recording can appear in the 120-window development/selector pool.
Use the frozen selector policy selected before true-heldout scoring.

success_gates.evidence: fast_speech / slow_speech / speaker counts / recover patch deployable features
success_gates.requirement: Selector inputs must not include DER, GT speaker count, oracle labels, or support from held-out scoring.

success_gates.evidence: target delta > 0 vs Fast on at least 8 recordings
success_gates.requirement: Weighted DER below Fast, with Miss/FA/Conf and arrival latency reported per recording.

run_plan: Create data/selector_true_heldout_split.csv with new recording ids and audio paths.
Run Fast/Slow window extraction on the sealed true-heldout recordings without changing selector thresholds.
Apply fixed selector policy ratio_le_0.65_else_uncovered to materialized timeline variants.
Report weighted DER/Miss/FA/Conf and rule-writeback arrival latency per recording.
Promote selector claim only if weighted DER beats Fast and leakage checks pass.
